bug_report.summary: Top Sites (Facebook) tile hover/selection styling/position differs after change (unexpected visual change)
steps_to_reproduce: Hover the mouse over the Facebook Top Sites tile (so the tile is highlighted and the three-dot menu appears).
expected_behaviors: Top Sites tile hover/selection highlight and the tile contents (icon, label, three-dot menu) should render consistently, with no unexpected size/position/style changes caused by unrelated code changes.
actual_behaviors: The Facebook Top Sites tile area renders differently after the change (within bbox ~[808,643]-[1112,799]); the tile highlight/overlay and/or element positioning appears altered compared to before. This is not described by the change intent and looks like an unintended UI change.

false_positive_reasons: LLM hallucination — misinterpreted or imagined GUI rendering
